---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, improvement, or change to make Quill-Sort better.
title: "[FEATURE_REQUEST]"
labels: Enhancement
assignees: dragonbreathIT

---

**What problem would this feature solve in your workflow?**  
Describe the real-world issue you’re hitting when using Quill-Sort.  
Example: “When I sort huge DataFrames, I have to dump to lists first, which is clunky and slow.”

**What would a ‘Quill-style’ solution look like to you?**  
Describe how you wish Quill-Sort handled this.  
Example: “I’d like to call `quill_sort(df, key='age')` and let Quill handle the heavy lifting and external mode automatically.”

**Have you tried any workarounds or alternatives?**  
List anything you’ve already tried (plain `sorted()`, manual chunking, other libs, etc.) and why it’s not ideal.

**Any extra context, examples, or pseudo-code?**  
Share sample code, data shapes (e.g. “10M rows, 5 columns”), or mock APIs that would make this feature feel natural in Quill-Sort.
